title: settings — field classification
description: SettingValue.payload inherits the classification of the underlying field. Sensitive fields (SettingField.sensitive=true) are treated as confidential-tier by default.

audit_log: Every settings change captured via activity + audit dual-write

notes: The payload column's classification is dynamic — depends on the field's SettingField.sensitive flag + optional encrypted_at_rest.
Reads mask sensitive payloads server-side; the `masked_payload` accessor returns `"***"` unless the caller passes ?reveal=true AND has settings.view-sensitive.
Every ?reveal=true use fires a `Audit Restricted Field Viewed` analytics event + writes a new audit row (meta-audit).
